audit_items.proof_trace: EVM transactions are inherently sequential — no true cross-transaction concurrency exists, so concurrent bids are serialized and each sees the correct post-previous-transaction balance. Within a single transaction, the `s_entered` boolean guard (line 418, reset line 457) is set before any external call, blocking reentrancy through the callback at line 449; any revert between lines 418-456 also reverts `s_entered = true` (no stuck state). The `balanceOf(this)` check at lines 437-440 therefore holds atomically per transaction.
